name: Apple Pan Dowdy
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. In the bottom of a buttered baking dish, sprinkle some brown sugar, nuts, and raisins.
3. Layer apples over these ingredients and then add the remaining brown sugar.
4. Cream together the butter and gradually add sugar until well combined.
5. Add the beaten egg to the mixture and stir until smooth.
6. Sift flour, baking powder, and salt into a bowl.
7. Alternately combine the creamed mixture with the dry ingredients and milk until everything is well incorporated.
8. Pour the batter over the apples in the dish.
9. Bake for 35-40 minutes.
10. Carefully turn the pan onto a plate, apple side up.
11. Serve with toppings such as whipped cream or other desired accompaniments.
